name: Lyn
desc: A young girl from the Lorca tribe. Stouthhearted and kind.

name: Sain
desc: A knight in service to house Caelin. A bit of a scoundrel.

name: Kent
desc: A knight in service to house Caelin. Virtuous to a fault.

name: Wil
desc: A youth from Pherae, in the Lycian League. Very social.

name: Dorcas
desc: A man from a small village in Bern. Fights for his wife.

name: Florina
desc: A pegasus knight earning her title. A friend of Lyn’s.

name: Rath
desc: A young hired sword from the Kutolah tribe.

name: Erk
desc: A young mage from Etruria. Charming, but uptight.

name: Wallace
desc: A retired knight of Caelin. Constantly testing himself.

name: Eagler
desc: Knight Commander of Caelin

name: Nils
desc: A bard possessing arcane powers. Brother of Ninian.

name: Eliwood
desc: Marquess Pherae’s young son. Just and honourable.

name: Marcus
desc: A paladin serving House Pherae. A skilled veteran.

name: Lowen
desc: A knight in service to House Pherae. A fresh recruit.

name: Rebecca
desc: A youth from Pherae. Very helpful and bright.

name: Bartre
desc: One of Eliwood’s guardsmen. Duty is everything to him.

name: Hector
desc: Marquess Ostia’s younger brother. Reckless, but loyal.

name: Oswin
desc: A knight in service to House Ostia. Hector’s sworn man.

name: Serra
desc: A cleric in service to House Ostia. Headstrong and bold.

name: Matthew
desc: A cheery thief. His casual demeanor belies his skill.

name: Guy
desc: A youth from Sacae. Yearns to be a swordmaster.

name: Merlinus
desc: A traveling merchant. Timid and easily frightened.

name: Dart
desc: A steadfast and honourable cavalier in sworn service to Renais.

name: Erk
desc: A young mage from Etruria. Charming, but uptight.

growths.name: Priscilla
growths.desc: A vassal in service to Count Caerleon of Etruria.

growths.name: Raven
growths.desc: A troubled mercenary with a grudge against House Ostia.

growths.name: Lucius
growths.desc: A travelling acolyte. Gentle and serene.

growths.name: Isadora
growths.desc: A paladin in service to House Pherae. Modest and polite.

growths.name: Batta
growths.desc: A Ganelon Bandit. Called the Beast for his savagery
A Ganelon Bandit. Called the Beast for his Savagery

growths.name: Glass
growths.desc: A Sacaen Swordsman with a greddy heart.
A Sacaen swordsman with a greedy heart.

growths.name: Erik
growths.desc: Son of Marquess Laus
The Son of Marquess Laus. Despises Eliwood and Hector

growths.name: Legault
growths.desc: A former Black Fang once known as Hurricane.

growths.name: Ninian
growths.desc: A somber girl. Quiet, but filled with a solemn energy.

growths.name: Heath
growths.desc: A deserter from Bern’s wyvern riders. Prideful.

growths.name: Karla
growths.desc: A dedicated swordfighter. Cool and detached.

growths.name: Zealot
growths.desc: The lord of Edessa leading the Ilia mercenary knights.

growths.name: Juno
growths.desc: A former squad leader of Ilia’s pegasus knights. Zealot’s wife.

growths.name: Fiora
growths.desc: Commander of the 5th wing of Ilia’s pegasus knights.

growths.name: Pent
growths.desc: Marquess of Reglay. Sole student of Archsage Athos.

growths.name: Louise
growths.desc: The wife of Marquess Reglay. A lethal beauty.

growths.name: Karel
growths.desc: An eastern swordmaster. Seeking worthy opponents.

growths.name: Harken
growths.desc: The sole survivor of the Knights of Pherae.

growths.name: Douglas
growths.desc: The Great General of Etruria.

growths.name: Canas
growths.desc: A scholar, and a novice student of ancient magics.

growths.name: Hawkeye
growths.desc: The protector of Nabata. A mysterious air surrounds him.

growths.name: Geitz
growths.desc: The eldest son of a wealthy merchant. Finding himself.

growths.name: Farina
growths.desc: A member of the 3rd wing of Ilia’s pegasus knights.

growths.name: Nino
growths.desc: One of the Black Fang. True and innocent.

growths.name: Jaffar
growths.desc: The Black Fang’s Angel of Death. Once served Nergal.

growths.name: Leila
growths.desc: A spy in service to House Ostia.

growths.name: Vaida
growths.desc: A courageous general in Grado’s army. He’s better known as Obsidian.

growths.name: Renault
growths.desc: A courageous general in Grado’s army. He’s better known as Obsidian.

growths.name: Fargus
growths.desc: A courageous general in Grado’s army. He’s better known as Obsidian.

growths.name: Uhai
growths.desc: A courageous general in Grado’s army. He’s better known as Obsidian.

growths.name: Lloyd
growths.desc: A courageous general in Grado’s army. He’s better known as Obsidian.

growths.name: Linus
growths.desc: A courageous general in Grado’s army. He’s better known as Obsidian.

growths.name: Athos
growths.desc: A courageous general in Grado’s army. He’s better known as Obsidian.

growths.name: O'Neill
growths.desc: A troop leader in Grado's army.

growths.name: Breguet
growths.desc: Commander of a Grado military force.

growths.name: Bone
growths.desc: One of Bazba's henchmen.

growths.name: Bazba
growths.desc: The leader of Bazba's bandits.

growths.name: Saar
growths.desc: Commander of Grado's border guard. His loyalty is unshakable.

growths.name: Selena
growths.desc: One of Grado's generals. She's also known by the name Fluorspar.

growths.name: Vigarde
growths.desc: The emperor of Grado, resurrected by the power of the Dark Stone

growths.name: Caellach
growths.desc: An ambitious general in Grado's army. He's better known as Tiger Eye.

growths.name: Valter
growths.desc: A general in Grado's army. This cruel man is also known as Moonstone.

growths.name: Riev
growths.desc: A heretic and general in Grado's army. He's also known as Blood Beryl.

growths.name: Lyon
growths.desc: The prince of Grado. The Dark Stone is slowly corrupting his body.
